title: orthospermum bonus-henricus
intro: Orthospermum bonus-henricus, also known as the yellow daisy bush, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and menstrual problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Orthospermum bonus-henricus include reducing inflammation, alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
